title: Climate Change & Marine Ecosystems

prerequisites.text: Acceptance for Honours or Master's specialising in EGS.

outline: The course introduces students to the effects of climate change on marine and coastal ecosystems and the implications for marine ecosystem services. The course focuses on three themes: (i) changing marine and coastal environments in the face of climate change; (ii) linking biological responses to climate-induced drivers; and (iii) climate change impacts on marine ecosystem services.
dp_requirements: At least 80% attendance and submission of all assignments.
assessment: Research paper 25%; seminar presentation 20%; poster 15%; exam 40%.
